description: Configure SeisComP's Map View (scmv) to display the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake (Japan) by setting both `events.visibleTimeSpan` and `events.retention` to at least `1000d` in the configuration file `~/.seiscomp/scmv.cfg`. Save a screenshot of the scmv window showing the earthquake event symbol to `~/scmv_noto_map.png`.
